desc:
Vault 94 was a Fallout-lore Vault-Tec experiment designed to test how a pacifist agrarian religious community would adapt to post-apocalyptic hardship. Equipped with a seed bank and G.E.C.K. to restore the earth, it was intended to see if the residents would adhere to their non-violent principles or modify them for survival. While its original role in the Fallout 76 game has been discontinued, the vault is now an explorable location.
Grid H8 (X: 3068, Y: 3002)
